From PCB assembly to final retail-ready product. We handle the complexity of electromechanical integration so you can focus on innovation.

Large Scale Manufacturing & Fulfillment

Our facility is engineered for high-volume throughput, providing a seamless transition from prototype sub-assemblies to full-scale commercial system integration.

Hardware Serialization
Custom Label Printing
Inventory Management
Drop-shipping Services
End-to-End Traceability

Electromechanical Assembly

Precision integration of PCBs into custom enclosures with calibrated torque control.

Cable & Wire Harnessing

Complex internal wiring, point-to-point connections, and professional cable management.

Software & Firmware

Automated flashing of firmware, OS installation, and initial boot-up verification.

Functional Burn-in

Extended stress testing and functional validation to ensure long-term field reliability.

Potting & Coating

Specialized encapsulation services for environmental protection and ruggedization.

Custom Packaging

Retail-ready or industrial-grade packaging with custom labeling and documentation.

Engineered for Reliability

Scale your hardware delivery with a partner that values precision as much as you do.
